hero.title: Track Your Lifts.
hero.description: The simplest way to remember what you lifted and push harder next time.

howItWorks.title: How
howItWorks.description: From building your routine to crushing PRs in three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Create workout routines with exercises, sets, reps, and weight targets. Use the built-in exercise library or add your own custom exercises.
howItWorks.step2Description: Log each set with weight and reps as you train. Track workouts on iPhone or directly from Apple Watch with the Digital Crown.
howItWorks.step3Description: See your max weight, total volume, and progression history for every exercise. Never forget what you lifted last week.

features.title: Built for
features.description: Everything you need in the gym, nothing you don't.
features.feature1Description: Log sets, reps, and weight right from your wrist. ProgLoad integrates with HealthKit to track heart rate and calories during workouts.
features.feature2Title: Works Solo or With a Coach
features.feature2Description: Train on your own with full control over your routines, or connect with a coach who can build programs and review your workouts. No coach required.
features.feature3Description: Track exercise stats over time. See your max weight, total volume, and progression history for every exercise to ensure you're getting stronger.

iphoneShowcase.headline: Build your routine. Log every set.
iphoneShowcase.body: Create routines with exercises, sets, and rep targets. Log each set in real time as you train. Use the built-in exercise library or add your own custom exercises.

watchShowcase.headline: Log sets right from your wrist.
watchShowcase.body: Swipe between exercises. Adjust weight with the Digital Crown. Tap to complete each set. HealthKit tracks your heart rate and calories automatically.

overload.headline: See your numbers go up.
overload.body: Track your max weight, total volume, and rep progression for every exercise. Know you're getting stronger, not just guessing.

modes.headline: Train solo. Or with a coach.
modes.body: ProgLoad works both ways. No coach required.
modes.coachPoint3: Real-time sync between you and your coach

privacy.headline: Your data. Your control.
privacy.privateBody: Your workouts are only visible to you. Share with a coach only if you choose to.
privacy.syncBody: Your data syncs instantly between iPhone and Apple Watch. Always up to date.
privacy.secureBody: All data encrypted in transit and at rest. Built on Firebase's security infrastructure.

trust.title: Your Data, Your Control
trust.description: ProgLoad is built with privacy in mind. Your workout data is yours.
trust.privateDescription: Your workouts are only visible to you. Choose to share with a coach only if you want to.
trust.syncDescription: Workouts sync instantly between iPhone and Apple Watch so your data is always up to date.
trust.secureDescription: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using Firebase's security infrastructure.

story.headline: Built by lifters, for lifters.
story.quote: We kept forgetting what we lifted last week and couldn't tell if we were actually getting stronger. We didn't need a complicated app — just a simple way to track our weights and see progress. ProgLoad is the app we wished we had when we started training.
story.title: Why We Built ProgLoad
story.descriptionPart1: We kept forgetting what we lifted last week and couldn't tell if we were actually getting stronger. We didn't need a complicated app. We needed a simple way to
story.descriptionHighlight: track our weights and see progress
story.descriptionPart2: . ProgLoad is the app we wished we had when we started training.

download.description: Download ProgLoad and start tracking your workouts today.

legal.privacyDescription: Learn how ProgLoad collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
legal.termsDescription: Read the terms and conditions for using the ProgLoad app.

support.title: Support
support.description: Have a question or running into an issue? We're here to help.
support.contactDescription: For any questions, bug reports, or feedback, send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
support.faq1Question: How do I create an account?
support.faq1Answer: Download ProgLoad from the App Store, tap Sign Up, and create your account with an email address. You'll choose your name and select whether you're a coach or an athlete.
support.faq2Question: How does the coach-athlete connection work?
support.faq2Answer: Coaches add customers by their email address. The customer receives an invitation and once accepted, the coach can assign routines and review their completed workouts.
support.faq3Question: Can I use ProgLoad without a coach?
support.faq3Answer: Yes! You can create your own routines and track workouts independently. The coach feature is optional -- ProgLoad works great for self-guided training too.
support.faq4Question: How does Apple Watch logging work?
support.faq4Answer: Open ProgLoad on your Apple Watch to see today's workout. Swipe between exercises, adjust weight and reps with the Digital Crown, and tap to complete each set. HealthKit integration tracks your heart rate and calories automatically.
support.faq5Question: How do I delete my account?
support.faq5Answer: You can request account deletion by emailing support@progload.app. We'll delete all your personal data within 30 days of your request, as described in our Privacy Policy.
support.faq6Question: Is ProgLoad available in my language?
support.faq6Answer: ProgLoad is currently available in English and Spanish. The app will automatically use your device's language if supported. If you'd like to suggest a new language, please email us.
